title: I can hold a full account without bracing
subtitle: A three-minute release-and-allow for the pattern of waiting for money to leave.
excerpt: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the feast-or-famine pattern. The bracing that starts the moment money arrives — the waiting for it to drain, the inability to relax when the account is full. Use in the flush period, when the reflex to brace is louder than the relief.
sourceNotes: Release / Allow structure: The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. Theme adapted from Day 4 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "End the feast/famine cycle." The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.

practice.whenToUse: Use in the flush period when the account is full but the body is already bracing for the dip, or during a gap period when the next payment hasn't arrived and the fear is building.

content.text: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the feast-or-famine pattern. The bracing that starts the moment money arrives — the inability to relax when the account is full because the waiting-for-it-to-leave has become reflex. Use it in the flush, when the relief should be there but isn't, or in the gap when the fear is building.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release the pattern of bracing for the dip the moment money arrives. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow the truth that I can hold a full account without bracing, and that steady income is safe for me. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
If the bracing is physical and the allow statement won't land, tap first.
works directly on the cycle. For a longer visualisation of what steady flow feels like in the body,
A level pool, not a churning sea
installs the image rather than arguing with the fear.

The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. The theme is adapted from Day 4 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The combination as a daytime reset is original to the homemade.education library.
